overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character approaching and entering an abandoned mine carved into rocky cliffs at dusk. The character ascends wooden steps into the dark tunnel entrance, transitioning from the dimly lit exterior to the pitch-black interior with wooden support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff path leading to abandoned mine entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the rocky path and wooden steps toward the dark mine entrance, looking up at the timber frame structure

entered.detail: large gray rock formation surrounding the mine entrance with rough texture
dark rectangular tunnel opening reinforced with heavy wooden beams and posts
brown cloth tarpaulin hanging from the scaffolding on the left side
rough wooden planks forming steps leading up to the mine entrance
timber support structures and beams along the cliff sides

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an abandoned mine entrance set into a rocky cliff face at dusk. Weathered wooden scaffolding and a fabric tarp flank the path, while rough wooden steps lead up to the dark tunnel opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mine entrance tunnel transitioning from natural to artificial darkness

events.description: character passes through the wooden mine entrance frame from exterior to interior space
location text 'Abandoned Mines' appears as ambient light rapidly fades to darkness

agents.ego_description: stepping into the mine entrance as the environment transitions from twilight to darkness

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the mine shaft with orange mineral deposits
thick timber posts and crossbeams supporting the mine ceiling
scattered rocks and rubble accumulated on the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters the abandoned mine, passing through the timber-framed entrance as the location text appears. The environment rapidly darkens from the dim exterior twilight to the shadowy interior, with rocky walls and wooden support beams becoming visible in the fading light.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep abandoned mine tunnel with wooden supports

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through the pitch-black mine tunnel, occasionally passing wooden support structures

entered.detail: wooden plank barriers blocking side passages deeper in the mine

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the abandoned mine, the character continues through near-total darkness with only faint ambient light revealing the rough tunnel walls and wooden support beams. The path winds through the rocky interior with occasional debris piles and wooden barriers visible along the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim cliffside exterior into the oppressive darkness of an abandoned mine. It begins with the character approaching a rocky cliff face at dusk, passing weathered wooden scaffolding and a fabric tarp while ascending rough wooden steps toward a dark tunnel opening. As the character crosses the threshold, the environment rapidly shifts from the fading twilight of the exterior to a shadowy interior where timber-framed supports and rocky walls emerge from the gloom. The scene then deepens into near-total darkness, with the camera winding through the rocky tunnel past occasional debris piles and wooden barriers. Finally, the path continues further into the subterranean void, guided only by faint ambient light reflecting off the rough stone walls.
